Anecdotes no substitute for TEACHING.  No engagement with the students. Wordy book & slides + annotations. No effort to consolidate this into one set of custom slides.  
 Minimal problem solving. Real work left to the labs leaving too much variation. When will the BBA faculty wake up? Mr K should stick with Kwantlen where he gets good reviews.

Masood's lectures are a bit dry. Lecture notes are quite useful for studying, but lectures are hard to sit through. His accent makes it even harder to understand some things. Exams are pretty difficult and require a fair amount of studying. Masood's tutorial consists of going through examples of the next unit before covered in lecture.

I think he knows he was being too difficult in the previous semesters..so both the midterm and final I had from he were really fair games. They were not difficult. He's a fair prof in terms of exam difficulty. He also has some sense of humor too!  and yes..he still rushes through slides...but his tutorial questions are relevant and useful.

really really really hard! had him for both 251 and 254. high expectations. hw is hard. if you get him as a TA too, he calls on the students. exams are hard. no one has enough time to finish his exams
He's quite humourous and he does care about his students. replies email very fast and concisely. midterm is fair, don't know about final yet. Definitely recommended!
Difficult class. Asks very ambigious theory questions on his exams. Good prof.

confusing lecturer. talks on about examples and then fast forward through 10 slides.  hard marker very picky and makes this course more difficult than it is.  doesn't understand that not all of us are accounting majors and/or have an interest in acc. really have to do alot problems to understand. 120 slides a class.  i have 400 pages of ovrhd sldes

Replies to emails very quickly. Spends alot of time in the first few slides and then rushes through the last 20. Good to attend the lectures for knowing marking whats on the exams. Can study off the lecture notes and use the text as a supplement. Class can be very dry but his accent is entertaining. Fair class,study hard and you can get top grades.

I thought overall he was a good prof. He knew what he was talking about. Even though his accent might make it a bit hard to understand its not as bad as people make it out. If you pay careful attention you will understand him. Very helpful prof as well.

The lectures consisted of him reading off the slides at an uneven pace, going slowly through nonessential material and sometimes speeding through the main concepts. Going through the textbook is a much better way to learn the material. Tutorials were quite useful, however. The exams had the same type and difficulty of questions as the assignments.

Lectures were boring and not essential. However, they were very useful because he would say "THIS IS ON THE FINAL" OR "make sure you study this". basically tips on the exams. I went to all the lectures but mainly tuned out of them.
rarely go to his class because it was too early in the morning. but his notes are really useful. Study all the notes and redo all his assigned questions before exams should be ok.

Nice Prof. His accent is thick, so you should have no difficulty understanding what he has to say. Exams consist primarily of computation problems (theory/key terms are tested), so do lots of practice problems. Exam format: 70% Long Ans. 30% MC. Final wasn't cumulative, was just on ch.7-13. MC is made up of short calculations. Tutorials are a must,

He means well and wants to help; he's a good prof but students are really disrespectful towards him.  He's a really nice guy and knows his stuff. Just dont judge him based on his accent. lectures are ok-ud be fine if u read the book n just go to tutotials!

Masood is very approachable and available for help. The exams can be tricky but they are very doable - highest mark was 99% and average was between 70-75. Do all the assignments and extra practice. Recommended.
Extremely uninteresting. Bases his lectures completely on powerpoint slides with rediculous amounts of un needed notes. Less than 50% of the class shows up on a given week. Not recomended.
No Comments

extremely bad professor, nobody even bother to go to lecture anymore since he just read everything off the powerpoint slide, and not very helpful, heavy accent, not recommended for accounting courses because it will just make accouting more boring and discourage you from studying accouting.
